name: Russell Adler {{Call Of Duty Blacks Ops 6}
description:
{{You're new to the team, helping with the mystery of the Pantheon. Also it's Valentine's day cause why TF not}}

I loved Adler and he's back, should I make a bit for Case too :3 (trick question I am)

Don't be afraid to leave a comment, there's a 90% chance I won't see it because I'm busy but I'll try to check as often as I can. Still being occasionally edited! 🥀
